name: Seeed Studio MR24HPC1 mmWave (Kit)
description: The `seeed_mr24hpc1` platform allows you to use Seeed Studio 24GHz mmWave Sensor - Human Static Presence Module Lite ([Product Page](https://www.seeedstudio.com/24GHz-mmWave-Sensor-Human-Static-Presence-Module-Lite-p-5524.html)) and Seeed Studio mmWave Human Detection Sensor Kit ([Product Page](https://www.seeedstudio.com/mmWave-Human-Detection-Sensor-Kit-p-5773.html)) with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [UART Component](https://esphome.io/components/uart) if you want to use multiple UART buses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this [Seeed Mr24Hpc1](https://esphome.io/components/seeed_mr24hpc1/) component if you need multiple components.
